name: A huge ballroom
description:
As you set foot into this huge ballroom you notice the small lights that dot
the ceiling above you, creating a small glow that barely lightens the room.  
Unfortunately it is totally empty and not a living soul except yourself is
here.  There is a small balcony overlooking the forest below and a small empty
table sitting in the corner.  What appears to be a fountain also sits in the
corner near the table.
